hub_subtitle: Business English para Gestão de Riscos e Finanças

lesson.menu_desc: Reporting what the team has done and defending a recommendation, in the present perfect -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 3 -- The Committee Decides: Report and Recommend
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sergio Takashi Tanaka | Lesson 3 -- The Committee Decides

listenings.text: Hello, everyone, and thank you for your reports this week. I have reviewed all the risk desks, and I have a few short messages. The market team has closed two positions, and the credit desk has raised its buffer. We have not resolved the counterparty issue yet, so it stays open for next week. Overall, the desks have managed the exposure well, and the regulator has not raised any new concerns. Please send your updated action plans before Friday. Thank you.

Hi Sergio, it is Paulo from the credit desk. A quick update before the committee. I have finished the review of the counterparty, and the numbers have improved since Monday. We have added the hedge, and the exposure has fallen below the threshold. I have not sent the final figures yet, but I will do it this afternoon. Can we agree on the recommendation before the meeting? I think we have done enough to keep the position open. Thanks.

extra_audio.text: The counterparty has breached the limit twice this week. The team has reviewed the exposure and reduced the position. We have added a hedge, and the exposure has fallen below the threshold. We have not escalated it to the board yet. In the committee, Sergio has recommended a higher buffer and flagged the counterparty to the regulator.
